title: EXACT DUALITY AND NILPOTENT GAUGING
publisher: World Scientific Pub Co Pte Lt
abstract: We obtain new duality transformations, relating some exact string backgrounds, by defining the nilpotent duality. We show that the ungauged SL (2, ℝ) WZW model transforms by its action into the three-dimensional plane wave geometry. We also give the inverse transformation from the plane wave to the SL (2, ℝ) model and discuss the implications of the results.
